title: kengia ramiflora
intro: Kengia ramiflora, a plant species belonging to the Annonaceae family, is a tropical vine native to the tropical forests of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin infections, and providing relief from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Kengia ramiflora is often used in infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, highlighting its versatility in traditional medicine.
